question: 'இந்தியா' நாட்டில் உள்ள தனித்துவமான மாநிலப் பெயர்களைப் பட்டியலிட்டு, 'ஆந்திரப் பிரதேச' மாநிலத்தில் காணப்படும் தனித்துவமான மாவட்டப் பெயர்களின் பட்டியலுடன் இணைக்கவும்.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T2.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh';
predicted_sql: SELECT state_name AS name FROM dim_state WHERE country_id = (SELECT country_id FROM dim_country WHERE country_name ILIKE 'India') UNION SELECT district_name AS name FROM dim_district WHERE state_id = (SELECT state_id FROM dim_state WHERE state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh');
raw_output: SELECT state_name AS name FROM dim_state WHERE country_id = (SELECT country_id FROM dim_country WHERE country_name ILIKE 'India') UNION SELECT district_name AS name FROM dim_district WHERE state_id = (SELECT state_id FROM dim_state WHERE state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh');

question: அனைத்து பதிவுகளுக்கும் மாவட்ட பெயர், மாநில பெயர் மற்றும் நாட்டின் பெயரை மாவட்டத்தின் பெயர் அகர வரிசைப்படி பட்டியலிடுக.

question: ஆந்திரப் பிரதேசம் என்ற மாநிலத்தின் மாவட்ட பெயர்களை அகர வரிசைப்படி குழுவாக்கப்பட்டு வரிசைப்படுத்தப்பட்டது.

SELECT dim_district.district_name
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_name
ORDER BY dim_district.district_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_district.district_name
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY dim_district.district_name
ORDER BY dim_district.district_name ASC;

question: ஒவ்வொரு மாநிலத்தின் பெயரையும், அதனுடன் தொடர்புடைய இட ஐடிகளின் எண்ணிக்கையையும் பட்டியலிடுங்கள். மாநிலத்தின் பெயரால் குழுவாக்கி, அதிக எண்ணிக்கையிலிருந்து குறைந்த எண்ணிக்கைக்கு வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC

question: List the state name, the district name, and the ULB/RLB village name for locations in the states of Assam, Andhra Pradesh, or Bihar, excluding those in the Prakasam district, grouped by state, district, and village name and ordered alphabetically by village and district.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN dim_district ON dim_location.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar'])
  AND dim_district.district_name NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name, dim_district.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN dim_district ON dim_location.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar'])
  AND dim_district.district_name NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name, dim_district.district_name;

question: 'பிகார்' மாநிலத்திற்கு, ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்தின் பெயரையும், தனித்தனி ULB/RLB கிராமப் பெயர்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையையும் பட்டியலிடுங்கள், பூஜ்ஜியத்திற்கும் அதிகமான கிராமங்களைக் கொண்ட மாவட்டங்களை மட்டுமே சேர்த்து, அதிகபட்ச எண்ணிக்கையைக் கொண்ட முதல் 10 மாவட்டங்களைக் காண்பியுங்கள்.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, COUNT(DISTINCT l.ulb_rlb_village_name) AS village_count
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_location l ON d.district_id = l.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
GROUP BY d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.ulb_rlb_village_name) > 0
ORDER BY village_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, COUNT(DISTINCT l.ulb_rlb_village_name) AS village_count
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_location l ON d.district_id = l.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
GROUP BY d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.ulb_rlb_village_name) > 0
ORDER BY village_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: 'சித்தூர்' மாவட்டத்தில் உள்ள உட்கோட்ட பெயர்கள் மற்றும் நகராட்சி/கிராம ஊராட்சி கிராம பெயர்களை, 'பிரகாசம்' மாவட்டத்திலும் காணப்படும் உட்கோட்டங்களை விலக்கி, உட்கோட்டம் மற்றும் கிராம பெயர் வாரியாக குழுவாக்கி, உட்கோட்ட பெயர் அகரவரிசையில் வரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location l
JOIN dim_district d ON l.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name ILIKE 'Chittoor'
  AND l.sub_district_name NOT IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT l2.sub_district_name
      FROM dim_location l2
      JOIN dim_district d2 ON l2.district_id = d2.district_id
      WHERE d2.district_name ILIKE 'Prakasam'
  )
GROUP BY l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY l.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location l
JOIN dim_district d ON l.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name ILIKE 'Chittoor'
  AND l.sub_district_name NOT IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT l2.sub_district_name
      FROM dim_location l2
      JOIN dim_district d2 ON l2.district_id = d2.district_id
      WHERE d2.district_name ILIKE 'Prakasam'
  )
GROUP BY l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY l.sub_district_name;

question: 2013 ஆம் ஆண்டு மக்கள் தொகை கணக்கெடுப்பின்படி, மதிப்பிடப்பட்ட கால்நடை எண்ணிக்கை பூஜ்யத்தை விட அதிகமாக உள்ள இடங்களுக்கான துணை-மாவட்ட பெயர்கள் மற்றும் ULB/RLB கிராம பெயர்களை பட்டியலிடுக, 2013 ஆம் ஆண்டில் மதிப்பிடப்பட்ட குடியிருப்பு-வணிக எண்ணிக்கையும் பூஜ்யத்தை விட அதிகமாக இருந்த இடங்களை விலக்கி, துணை-மாவட்டம் மற்றும் கிராம பெயர்களால் குழுவாக்கி, துணை-மாவட்டத்தின் அகரவரிசைப்படி வரிசைப்படுத்துக.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T1.LOCATION_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T4.LOCATION_ID FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T4 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T5 ON T4.TIME_ID = T5.TIME_ID WHERE T5.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T4.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN fact_primary_sector ON dim_location.location_id = fact_primary_sector.location_id
JOIN dim_time ON fact_primary_sector.time_id = dim_time.time_id
LEFT JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON dim_location.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id AND dim_time.time_id = fact_establishment_totals.time_id
WHERE dim_time.census_year = 2013
  AND fact_primary_sector.est_livestock > 0
  AND (fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial = 0 OR fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial IS NULL OR fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial <= 0)
GROUP BY dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN fact_primary_sector ON dim_location.location_id = fact_primary_sector.location_id
JOIN dim_time ON fact_primary_sector.time_id = dim_time.time_id
LEFT JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON dim_location.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id AND dim_time.time_id = fact_establishment_totals.time_id
WHERE dim_time.census_year = 2013
  AND fact_primary_sector.est_livestock > 0
  AND (fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial = 0 OR fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial IS NULL OR fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial <= 0)
GROUP BY dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name;

raw_output:
SELECT
    dim_location.sub_district_name,
    SUM(fact_transport_hospitality.est_transport_storage) AS total_transport_storage,
    SUM(fact_transport_hospitality.est_accommodation_food) AS total_accommodation_food
FROM fact_transport_hospitality
JOIN dim_location ON fact_transport_hospitality.location_id = dim_location.location_id
JOIN dim_time ON fact_transport_hospitality.time_id = dim_time.time_id
WHERE dim_time.census_year = (SELECT MAX(census_year) FROM dim_time)
GROUP BY dim_location.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_transport_storage DESC;
